books.title: Automated Book Generation
books.outline:
Book positioning summary: A practical guide.

1. Introduction to the topic - Defines the promise of the book.
2. Core foundations - Explains the main concepts.
3. Applied workflow - Shows how to use the concepts.
4. Advanced patterns - Covers nuanced decisions.
5. Final integration - Brings everything together.
